title: Contact the test team
intro: A second singleton page helps verify that simpler marketing-style content stays pleasant to edit after the redesign.
body:
## Reach out when you want to test a flow

Use this page to check the primitive field adapters in a single place: email, text, URL, markdown, and a small collection block.

### Good smoke tests

- change the office hours
- replace the hero copy
- upload a new gallery image
- confirm the rendered page still looks tidy

gallery.alt: A studio entrance sign with wayfinding arrows
gallery.caption: Use image uploads here to verify path handling for reusable block assets.

gallery.alt: A long meeting table set up for a product review
gallery.caption: This page leans on straightforward structured content instead of special frontend logic.
